title: Could Kaworu really be considered the fifth child
display_title: Could Kaworu really be considered the fifth child
wikitext:
[]: Could Kaworu really be considered the fifth child?             Quote Post by Τριάδα_IBLIS_β » Tue Oct 18, 2022 10:47 am Just something that's been stirring in my head for sometime since Episode 24

[]: Re: Could Kaworu really be considered the fifth child?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Thu Oct 20, 2022 3:50 am Yes. It's how he's referred to.

[]: Re: Could Kaworu really be considered the fifth child?             Quote Post by gelflinghand » Mon Oct 24, 2022 12:56 am As much as Rei can be considered the First Child. The two of them have different qualifications for piloting Evas than all the other pilots and potential pilots, but they certainly can pilot them.

[]: Re: Could Kaworu really be considered the fifth child?             Quote Post by Angel » Sun Oct 30, 2022 11:06 pm Here's a better question: HOW did Kaworu get to be the Fifth Child? Pilots are selected by the Marduk Institute, which eventually turns out to be just Gendo. SEELE can't just dump some random kid on NERV's doorstep and say "he's a pilot now, deal with it"... can they?

[]: Re: Could Kaworu really be considered the fifth child?             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Nov 02, 2022 1:27 pm They evidently can; remember, they are a kabal of rich old white dudes who run functionally the entire world through shell corporations. Some manipulation of information is nothing to them, neither in terms of effort nor conscience

[]: Re: Could Kaworu really be considered the fifth child?             Quote Post by Τριάδα_IBLIS_β » Wed Nov 09, 2022 5:11 pm Angel wrote: Here's a better question: HOW did Kaworu get to be the Fifth Child? Pilots are selected by the Marduk Institute, which eventually turns out to be just Gendo. SEELE can't just dump some random kid on NERV's doorstep and say "he's a pilot now, deal with it"... can they?

[]: Re: Could Kaworu really be considered the fifth child?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Wed Nov 09, 2022 6:54 pm Blockio wrote: They evidently can; remember, they are a kabal of rich old white dudes who run functionally the entire world through shell corporations. Some manipulation of information is nothing to them, neither in terms of effort nor conscience

[]: Re: Could Kaworu really be considered the fifth child?             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Nov 11, 2022 7:41 pm Also that, yes. Even while scheming against another, Gendo was still bound by their authority. This is very beautifully shown in one of Ritsuko's line, nonchalantly noting that Kaworu is probably the final angel: she knows, by extension Gendo and Fuyutsuki probably know, but have all accepted that at current, there's nothing that can really be done about that, because the order to take him in came from up the food chain, and getting in trouble with Seele while the final angel is still out there would cause way more problems than it solves
summary:
